title: 10 Herbal Teas Proven to Help with Tinnitus
description: Lavandula angustifolia tea, also known as lavender tea, has been studied for its potential to help with tinnitus. Tinnitus is a condition where people hear ringing or other sounds in their ears when there's no outside noise. This can be very annoying and affect daily life. Some research suggests that lavender tea may help with tinnitus because it has calming effects on the body and mind. Lavender tea contains chemicals that can help reduce anxiety and stress, which are common triggers ...
